caption: A man with a distinctive tall, grey, peaked hairstyle wears headphones, glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red patterned bow tie, and tan suspenders. He is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a black microphone. In the background, a woman with pink hair wears a green dress and stands near a wall featuring "UNIQUE FASHIONS" text and a framed shield logo. Red and white logos are overlaid on the screen, including a circular "BOSS TALK PODCAST" logo on the left and the text "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, gesturing with his left hand, which moves from his side to be raised in front of him. The woman in the background remains standing, slightly shifting her posture as she looks toward the man.
